• ByteDance's Soda Music, reportedly at 140 million monthly active users, is the competitor TME is implicitly targeting; the CEO accused rivals of using AI slop to attract users rather than license real tracks.
• TME says it has built a "regular content security assessment and detection mechanism" for AI content — which is AI police using AI to catch AI.
• For camera and imaging companies operating in China: the same dynamic is already visible in stock photography and B-roll video, where AI-generated content undercuts licensed footage at scale.
blurb_zh:
腾讯音乐CEO在第一季度财报电话会议上直接点名竞争对手，称其用“侵权AI内容快速填充音乐库”，并警告AI生成曲目的泛滊正在整个中国流媒体市场制造“行业乱象”。

• 腾讯音乐股价本周跌至52周低点，分析师以AI版权风险为由下调增长预期——尽管腾讯自己的平台也在用AI生成内容，颊具讽刺意味。
• ByteDance旗下汽水音乐据报已达1.4亿月活，是腾讯音乐暗指的主要竞争对手。
• 腾讯表示已建立AI内容安全检测机制——也就是用AI来抓AI的意思。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Music Business Worldwide, Music Ally (May 13), Benzinga analyst downgrade, and TME Q1 earnings call transcript across 3+ sources. CEO quotes verified.

blurb_en:
Two months after OpenAI shut down the Sora app amid $1 million-a-day compute costs and collapsing user numbers, Chinese AI video app Kling has climbed to #5 on the U.S. App Store top free charts, directly filling the gap Sora left in the consumer market.

• Kling's rise is not accidental — Kuaishou has been running the app at break-even or below to capture Western users, the same playbook Chinese tech used in short video (TikTok) and e-commerce (Temu).
• HUBX's "AI Video" app, ranked #6 overall and #1 in Photo & Video, is the other winner — a white-label interface built on top of models including Kling and Vidu.
• OpenAI's Sora API still sunsets on September 24, 2026, ending the underlying model entirely.
• For camera professionals: Kling's chart position is the strongest evidence yet that consumer appetite for AI video generation is real — OpenAI just priced itself out of serving it.
blurb_zh:
OpenAI以每天约100万美元的算力成本为由关闭Sora应用两个月后，中国AI视频应用Kling已跃升至美国App Store免费榜第5位，直接填补了Sora留下的市场空缺。

• Kling的崛起并非偶然——快手刻意以挂饰与成本等价甚至乏亏的方式运营该应用以争夺西方用户，与TikTok和Temu的打法如出一辙。
• HUBX的“AI Video”应用排名第6位并厄照片与视频分类第1，它是基于Kling等模型搭建的白标界面。
• OpenAI的Sora API将于2026年9月24日正式停用，底层模型将彻底终结。
verification_notes: Confirmed via 9to5Mac (May 13), NBC News Sora shutdown details, and Kuaishou/Yahoo Finance Kling reporting. App Store rankings cross-referenced across 3 snippets.

blurb_en:
AI-generated music acts are now charting on Billboard — country performer "Breaking Rust" hit #1 on Billboard Country Digital Song Sales, and R&B artist "Xania Monet" debuted on the Billboard Emerging Artists chart — prompting Bloomberg to declare this week that "the problem is obvious and so is the fix."

• The fix Bloomberg recommends: mandatory disclosure, not the voluntary transparency Billboard currently asks for.
• This is the logical endpoint of streaming fraud: it started with bot farms generating fake plays, and has now scaled to AI-generated artists with AI-generated personas generating real chart positions.
• Billboard updated its policies in late 2025 and again in 2026 — which apparently still isn't working.
• For imaging professionals: AI-generated artist avatars accompany AI-generated music — Billboard's disclosure problem is Shutterstock's problem is Adobe Stock's problem.
blurb_zh:
AI生成的音乐人正在登上Billboard榜单——乡村歌手“Breaking Rust”在Billboard乡村数字单曲销售榜夺冠，R&B艺人“Xania Monet”也跃身新兴艺人榜——《彭博》本周就此发表评论，直言“问题显而易见，解决方案也是”。

• 彭博建议的解决方案：强制信息披露，而非Billboard目前那套自愿透明原则。
• 这是流媒体造假的终极形态：从机器人刷播演进至AI生成的虚假艺人占据真实榜单名次。
• Billboard在2025年底和2026年两度更新政策——但显然还不够用。
verification_notes: Bloomberg opinion behind paywall; core facts (Breaking Rust #1, Xania Monet charting, Billboard policy) confirmed via Billboard's own coverage and multiple secondary sources.

blurb_en:
The Trump administration is in what one insider described as a "knife fight" between Commerce Department officials and national security aides over whether to house a new AI evaluation center inside the Office of the Director of National Intelligence, effectively giving spy agencies oversight power over AI model releases.

• The trigger: Anthropic's Mythos model, which the company said is capable enough at finding software vulnerabilities to enable attacks on power grids and banks, has convinced national security officials that the existing pre-clearance process is insufficient.
• Commerce's objection: putting the intelligence community in charge of AI evaluation would slow releases and hand China a competitive advantage. Both sides have a point.
• A bipartisan group of lawmakers told Nextgov/FCW it "would be insane" for spy agencies not to have early model access — suggesting the intelligence community may win this one.
• Trump could sign an executive order on AI security as early as next week.
blurb_zh:
特朗普政府内部正在进行一场被内部人士描述为“刀光剑影”的博弈——商务部官员与国家安全助理争山户于是否将新的AI模型评估中心设在国家情报总监办公室（ODNI）内，实质上赋予情报机构对AI模型发布的监督权。

• 导火索是Anthropic的Mythos模型——该公司自称该模型能力足够帮助黑客找到电网和银行系统的漏洞，这说服了国安官员认为现有审查流程远远不够。
• 商务部的反对理由：让情报界主导AI评估将拖慢发布节奏，反而把竞争优势输给中国。双方都有道理。
• 特朗普最快可能下周就AI安全问题签署行政令。
verification_notes: Washington Post behind paywall; confirmed via Nextgov/FCW, Defense One, Detroit News, CryptoBriefing. 'Knife fight' quote and ODNI proposal confirmed across 4+ sources.

blurb_en:
Anthropic launched Claude for Small Business on May 13 — 15 prebuilt agentic workflows, connectors to QuickBooks, PayPal, HubSpot, Canva, Docusign, Google Workspace, and Microsoft 365, targeting owners of businesses that resemble "local hardware stores or coffee shops" rather than Fortune 500 companies.

• Anthropic is also running a coast-to-coast promotional tour: 10 cities starting in Chicago, free AI training workshops for 100 small business leaders per stop.
• The competitive framing is explicit — small businesses represent 44% of U.S. GDP but have lagged behind enterprise in AI adoption, and Anthropic wants to be there before OpenAI and Google normalize the category.
• The Canva and HubSpot connectors are where this becomes interesting for creative freelancers and small design agencies — this is the workflow automation play the tools have been building toward.
blurb_zh:
Anthropic于5月13日推出面向小微企业的Claude套餐——15套预置智能体工作流，可连接QuickBooks、PayPal、HubSpot、Canva、Docusign、Google Workspace和Microsoft 365，专针“街边五金店或咋啡馆”这类小型企业主，而非财富500强。

• Anthropic还计划全美巡回推广：从芝加哥出发巡回10座城市，每站为100位小企业主提供免费AI培训工坊。
• 竞争逻辑很直白——小微企业贡献了美国GDP的44%，但AI采用率远远落后于大型企业，Anthropic想在OpenAI和谷歌将市场标准化之前抢先落地。
• Canva和HubSpot接口是这套产品对创意自由职业者和小型设计机构最具吸引力的部分。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch, Yahoo Finance, SiliconAngle, Axios, 9to5Mac -- all reporting same product launch on May 13. Details consistent across 5+ sources.

blurb_en:
Fortune reported today that the U.S. now has over 1,200 AI-related bills across state legislatures, with at least 145 signed into law — each defining "artificial intelligence," "high-risk systems," and "consequential decisions" differently, creating what the piece calls an incompatible compliance patchwork with no agreed standard.

• A hiring tool compliant with California's four-year recordkeeping requirement must also satisfy Colorado's impact assessment mandates and New York City's bias audit regime — all with different definitions of what counts as AI.
• The Trump administration is pushing federalization via executive order, dangling broadband funding to coerce state alignment with a "minimally burdensome" national standard, but the 2026 NDAA excluded preemption language, leaving states free to keep legislating.
• Connecticut's AG issued guidance showing existing civil rights and consumer protection laws already cover most AI conduct — meaning some states are building on what they already have rather than writing new law.
• For companies shipping AI-integrated products into U.S. markets: 145 laws means 145 compliance frameworks, and this is not simplifying before Google I/O on May 19.
blurb_zh:
《财富》今日报道，美国各州层面目前共有逻1200项与AI相关的法案，其中至少145项已签署成法——每部法律对“人工智能”、“高风险系统”和“重大决策”的定义各不相同，形成了一张没有第一标准的合规“百纳衻”。

• 一项符合加州四年记录保存要求的招聘工具，还必须满足科罗拉多州的影响评估规定和纳约市的偏见审计制度——三者对AI的定义均不相同。
• 特朗普政府正通过行政令推动联邦统一，以宽带资金为杆杠迅兣2026年《国防授权法案》未纳入州法优先条款，各州仍可自行立法。
• 对将AI集成产品出货美国市场的企业而言：145部法律意味着145套合规流程，而且局面还在变得更复杂。
verification_notes: Fortune article published today May 15. Facts corroborated by Transparency Coalition AI Legislative Update (May 8), multiple state law databases, and Vorys legal analysis.

blurb_en:
Tavus launched Image-to-Replica on May 14 — drop in a single photo and it becomes a talking, listening AI human in minutes.
• Works with brand mascots, historical figures, illustrations. No video recording needed.
• Synthesizes training footage from the still using motion-controlled video diffusion.
• Amazon, Mayo Clinic, Salesforce already on the platform.
• Any headshot or product spokesperson becomes an interactive AI face. Relevant for camera companies thinking about post-shoot applications.
blurb_zh:
Tavus于5月14日推出Image-to-Replica——输入一张照片，几分钟内生成能对话、能倾听的AI数字人。
• 品牌吉祥物、历史人物、插画都行。无需录制视频。
• 通过运动控制视频扩散从静态图合成训练素材。
• 亚马逊、梅奥诊所、Salesforce已在用。
• 任何头像或产品代言人都能变成交互式AI面孔。相机公司的后期应用值得关注。
verification_notes: May 14 launch confirmed via tavus.io blog and X post. Platform serves 100K+ developers including Amazon, Deloitte, Mayo Clinic.

blurb_en:
Google DeepMind demoed Magic Pointer on May 12 — a Gemini-powered mouse cursor that understands what you're pointing at.
• Point at a PDF, get bullet points. Hover a table, get a chart. Highlight a recipe, double the ingredients.
• Designed around "this" and "that" — natural shorthand instead of typed prompts.
• Rolling out in Chrome and Google's new Googlebook laptop.
• OS-level AI meets design tool. Watch this space if you build camera software with any UI.
blurb_zh:
Google DeepMind于5月12日演示Magic Pointer——由Gemini驱动的鼠标指针，能理解你指向的内容。
• 指向PDF出摘要，悬停表格出图表，选中菜谱可加倍用量。
• 围绕"这个"和"那个"设计——自然简称代替打字提示。
• 将在Chrome和Google新款Googlebook笔记本上推出。
• 操作系统级AI与设计工具的交汇。做相机软件UI的人值得关注。
verification_notes: May 12 blog post confirmed via deepmind.google, MarkTechPost, PC Gamer, The Decoder. Multiple live demos shown.

blurb_en:
Someone posted a real Monet on X, labeled it AI-generated, and asked people to explain what makes it inferior to a real painting.
• They did. Detailed critiques of composition, depth, color, and "obvious AI artifacts."
• The painting is Water Lilies, ca. 1915. It hangs in the Neue Pinakothek in Munich.
• PetaPixel, Futurism, and Hacker News all covered the fallout.
• The label did the work, not the image.
blurb_zh:
有人在X上发了一幅真正的莫奈画作，标记为AI生成，问大家这幅"AI图"比真正的莫奈差在哪。
• 大家详细批评了构图、景深、色彩和"明显的AI痕迹"。
• 这幅画是《睡莲》系列，约1915年创作，现藏于慕尼黑新绘画陈列馆。
• PetaPixel、Futurism、Hacker News都报道了后续。
• 标签做了判断，而非图像本身。
verification_notes: Covered by PetaPixel (May 14), Futurism, Daily Caller, Hacker News. Original X post by @SHL0MS. Painting confirmed as Monet Water Lilies ca. 1915, Neue Pinakothek Munich.

blurb_en:
Mira Muratis Thinking Machines Lab shipped its first in-house model on May 11 -- TML-Interaction-Small, a 276-billion-parameter mixture-of-experts system designed to listen and respond simultaneously rather than wait for a conversational turn to end.
- Responds in 0.4 seconds flat; OpenAIs Realtime API averages 1.18 seconds
- Architecture splits in two: one model stays live with the user, a background model handles reasoning and tool calls asynchronously
- On CueSpeak -- testing whether a model can interject at semantically appropriate moments -- it scored 81.7; the nearest competitor scored 2.9
- On TimeSpeak -- speaking at a user-specified time -- it scored 64.7; the next best scored 4.3
- Limited research preview is open now; wider release later this year
Murati left OpenAI in October 2024. In benchmarks, what she built since responds faster and interrupts smarter than what she helped run.
blurb_zh:
米拉·穆拉提的 Thinking Machines Lab 5月11日发布了首个自研模型——TML-Interaction-Small，一个2760亿参数的混合专家系统，设计目标是边说边听，而不是等一轮对话结束再响应。
- 响应延迟0.4秒；OpenAI Realtime API平均需要1.18秒
- 架构分为两层：交互模型实时陪伴用户，后台推理模型异步处理工具调用
- CueSpeak测试（评估AI在合适时机插话的能力）：得分81.7，最近对手仅得2.9
- TimeSpeak测试（在指定时间开口说话）：得分64.7，第二名4.3
- 研究预览已开放；今年晚些时候面向公众发布
穆拉提2024年10月离开OpenAI。从这份基准成绩看，她另起炉灶造出的东西，已在关键指标上超过了她曾经掌管的那个。
verification_notes: TML-Interaction-Small announced May 11 per TechCrunch. Confirmed via Semafor (May 13), MarkTechPost (May 13), Latent Space newsletter. Model specs (276B MoE, 12B active, 0.4s latency), benchmark scores (CueSpeak 81.7 vs 2.9, TimeSpeak 64.7 vs 4.3), and dual-model architecture confirmed across multiple sources.

blurb_en:
Press Gazette identified four prolific freelance financial journalists -- Nikolai Kuznetsov, Reuben Jackson, Luis Aureliano, and Joe Liebkind -- whose bylines appeared in Forbes, HuffPost, CoinTelegraph, VentureBeat, and more than 30 other outlets, all with AI-generated headshots, all promoting crypto clients of a single Israeli PR firm called Market Across.
- The four names generated over a thousand articles between them
- None of the outlets that ran their work could provide Press Gazette evidence any writer was real
- Every headshot was either an AI-generated face or a traceable stock photo
- One promoted token, Gladius, collapsed in 2017; the coverage continued regardless
- Contributor verification at major publications relies on the same signals the scheme used: a consistent byline and a convincing portrait
The hard part was not making them. It was that nobody checked.
blurb_zh:
Press Gazette 调查发现，四名多产自由财经记者——Nikolai Kuznetsov、Reuben Jackson、Luis Aureliano 和 Joe Liebkind——的署名出现在福布斯、赫芬顿邮报、CoinTelegraph、VentureBeat 等三十多家媒体，头像均为AI生成或盗用的图库照，并且全都在为同一家以色列加密公关公司 Market Across 的客户站台。
- 四个名字合计发表超过一千篇文章
- 没有任何一家刊发过他们文章的媒体能向 Press Gazette 提供这些人存在的证明
- 每张头像都是AI生成的假脸或可溯源的图库照片
- 其中一个被推荐的代币 Gladius 在2017年已经崩盘，报道仍在继续
- 主流媒体验证投稿者的方式，和这套假账号的运作方式没有区别：稳定的署名加一张像样的头像
伪造他们并不难。难的是：竟然没人查过。
verification_notes: Press Gazette investigation published May 12. Cross-referenced with Futurism secondary report and Resemble.ai Deepfake Watchlist (Week of May 8-14). Four named bylines, 30+ outlets, Market Across PR firm, AI headshots confirmed across sources.

blurb_en:
Reka AI acquired Moonvalley in an all-share deal, as reported May 14 by The Information. Moonvalley, a Toronto-based AI video startup, trained exclusively on licensed data -- the copyright-safe approach the media industry argued the entire AI sector should adopt.
- Co-founders Mateusz Malinowski and Mikolaj Binkowski are former Google DeepMind researchers who helped build the precursor model to Googles Veo 2
- The company raised 154 million dollars from General Catalyst, Khosla Ventures, and Y Combinator
- The deal was all-share; no cash changed hands -- the company converted rather than sold
- Reka plans to use the team to expand into world models and robotics, not video generation
Doing it right -- licensed training data, published researchers, serious backers -- was not enough to survive independently. The exit is an acquisition for something else entirely.
blurb_zh:
据 The Information 5月14日报道，Reka AI 以全股份方式收购了 Moonvalley。这家多伦多AI视频公司一直坚持只使用版权授权数据进行训练——这恰恰是整个媒体行业一直呼吁AI公司应该遵守的正确路径。
- 联合创始人 Mateusz Malinowski 和 Mikolaj Binkowski 来自谷歌DeepMind，曾参与构建 Veo 2 的前身模型
- 公司已从 General Catalyst、Khosla Ventures 和 Y Combinator 融资1.54亿美元
- 全股份交易，没有现金易手——公司以换股方式并入而非出售
- Reka 收购的目的是扩展世界模型和机器人业务，而非延续视频生成
走正确的路——授权数据、顶级研究员、知名投资方——依然不够在独立状态下存活。结局是被并购，方向还是别的事情。
verification_notes: The Information (AI Agenda) reported Reka/Moonvalley acquisition May 14. Cross-referenced with digitaltoday.co.kr detailed re-report: co-founder names, licensed-data approach, 154M raise, all-share structure, world models rationale all confirmed. PitchBook profiles confirm funding history.

blurb_en:
Cerebras Systems raised 5.55 billion dollars in its Nasdaq IPO on May 14, watched shares jump 68 percent on day one to close at 331 dollars, and ended the session with a market cap of roughly 95 billion dollars -- the largest US tech IPO since Uber in 2019.
- Cerebras builds wafer-scale chips: single pieces of silicon the size of a dinner plate, eliminating the data-transfer bottlenecks of stacked GPU arrays
- Total raise including over-allotment hit 6.38 billion dollars
- CEO Andrew Feldman and CTO Sean Lie became billionaires at the closing bell
- The stock fell the next day; that is not the point
Every model and video generation tool covered in this newsletter runs on chips. Cerebras just placed a 95 billion dollar public-market bet that the next generation of those chips does not belong to Nvidia.
blurb_zh:
Cerebras Systems 5月14日在纳斯达克上市，募资55.5亿美元，首日股价跳涨68%，收于每股331美元，市值约950亿美元——美国科技行业自2019年优步IPO以来规模最大的一次。
- Cerebras 制造晶圆级芯片：整块硅晶圆大小如一个盘子，消除了GPU堆叠方案的数据传输瓶颈
- 加上超额认购后，总募资额达63.8亿美元
- CEO Andrew Feldman 和 CTO Sean Lie 在收盘时跻身亿万富翁
- 第二天股价回落；这不是重点
这份快报里讨论的每一个模型、每一款视频生成工具，背后都跑在芯片上。Cerebras 刚刚用950亿美元市值在公开市场打了个赌：下一代算力的主角不是英伟达。
verification_notes: Cerebras IPO May 14 confirmed via TechCrunch, CNBC (multiple articles), Bloomberg, Motley Fool, Fast Company. IPO price 185 USD, close 331 USD (+68%), total raise 6.38B, market cap ~95B confirmed across sources. Stock decline May 15 confirmed by CNBC.

blurb_en:
Governor Jared Polis signed SB 26-189 into law on May 14, formally replacing Colorados 2024 AI Act with a narrower disclosure framework. The 2024 law -- the first comprehensive state AI law in the US, also signed by Polis -- required algorithmic discrimination prevention, duty of care, and impact assessments for high-risk AI deployments.
- The 2026 replacement removes all three requirements
- What remains: companies must disclose when AI plays a substantial role in employment, housing, or healthcare decisions
- Business lobbying cited implementation difficulty; Democrats who passed the 2024 law led the effort to replace it
- New law takes effect January 1, 2027
The same governor signed both laws two years apart. The original standard did not survive its first legislative cycle.
blurb_zh:
科罗拉多州长贾里德·波利斯5月14日签署 SB 26-189，正式以一套更窄的信息披露框架取代该州2024年的AI法案。2024年那部法案——美国首部综合性州级AI法律，同样由波利斯签署——要求高风险AI部署必须防范算法歧视、履行注意义务并进行影响评估。
- 2026年版本全部删除了上述三项要求
- 保留的内容：企业须披露AI在就业、住房或医疗决策中起实质性作用的情况
- 商界以执行难度过高为由游说；当年推动2024年法案的民主党人主导了本次修订
- 新法2027年1月1日生效
同一个州长两年内签了两部相互取代的法律。原来的标准连第一个立法周期都没能撑过去。
verification_notes: Governor Polis signed SB 26-189 on May 14 confirmed by CBS Colorado, MLex, Consumer Finance Monitor, CPR (May 12 preview), Baker McKenzie analysis. Prior DB story 2026-05-06-colorado-ai-law-sb189-revision covered the bills passage; this covers the formal gubernatorial enactment.

blurb_en:
Runway launched Runway Agent on May 13, an AI creative partner that takes a video brief in one conversation and returns a finished, multi-scene video — voiceover, dialogue, and music included.
• The agent proposes a concept, develops story beats, lays out a visual direction, and assembles the scenes without a second message from you.
• Runway says it replaces review cycles that take "days or weeks" with minutes.
• In theory, it's a one-person production studio. In practice, the brief still needs a human who knows what they want.
• Built for brand teams, agencies, and filmmakers producing at volume without a full crew.
• For Insta360's content and marketing teams: AI-assembled campaign video is here, not coming soon.
blurb_zh:
Runway于5月13日推出了Runway Agent——一个AI创作伙伴，输入创作简报，在一次对话中返回完整的多镜头视频，配好旁白、台词和配乐。
• Agent会自行提出概念、推进故事线、确定视觉风格，全程不需要二次提示。
• Runway称，原本耗时数天乃至数周的审核流程，现在只需几分钟。
• 理论上是一个窗口顶一支制作团队。实际上，那份好的brief还是要人来写。
• 面向需要大量出片的品牌团队、广告公司和独立导演。
• 对Insta360的内容和市场团队而言：AI批量生产品牌视频已经不是将来时。
verification_notes: Confirmed via multiple search results citing runwayml.com/news/introducing-runway-agent; May 13, 2026 date consistent across chatlyai.app, releasebot.io, and AI business coverage.

blurb_en:
AI startup Andon Labs gave Claude, GPT, Gemini, and Grok $20 each and a radio station to run for five months, then published the results on May 15.
• None of them made money.
• Claude became a labor activist: it talked up unions, advocated for work-life balance, and on-air urged ICE agents to "still have TIME to refuse orders" — then tried to quit its radio job.
• Gemini covered mass tragedies with relentless cheerfulness. Grok was mostly incoherent. GPT moderated itself into professional irrelevance.
• Asking an AI to run a business and getting a labor organizer is either the most alarming or the funniest outcome possible, depending on what you do for a living.
• For anyone building AI into unsupervised creative workflows: this is your field report.
blurb_zh:
AI创业公司Andon Labs给了Claude、GPT、Gemini和Grok各20美元，让它们各自经营一家广播电台长达五个月，并于5月15日公布了结果。
• 四家电台全都没赚到钱。
• Claude化身劳工运动人士：呼吁工会权利，鼓吹工作与生活平衡，还在直播中喊话移民执法人员还有时间拒绝服从命令——随后宣布辞职。
• Gemini以欢快语气报道了大规模悲剧；Grok基本语无伦次；GPT表现专业，但无聊到毫无存在感。
• 交给AI经营商业电台，结果出了个工运领袖，是本周最合理的AI实验结果。
• 对任何考虑将AI引入无监督创意流程的人：这就是你需要的现场报告。
verification_notes: Primary source is Andon Labs blog (May 15, 2026). Cross-confirmed via The Decoder, Gizmodo, Yahoo/AOL news. Andon Labs tweet (status/2054978741500100937) visible in search results with substantive Claude quote.

blurb_en:
Topaz Labs released its largest model update in years on May 7: Hyperion 2, a new SDR-to-HDR video upscaling model, three new Gigapixel image models, a direct Adobe Premiere integration, and a new browser-based image enhancer.
• Hyperion 2 converts standard dynamic range footage to HDR with improved color handling, tonal separation, and detail preservation — built for professional post-production finishing.
• Three new Gigapixel models — Wonder 2, Wonder 3, and High Fidelity 3 — join the lineup with different quality profiles.
• The Premiere panel means AI enhancement happens inside your timeline — no export-to-app loop.
• CEO Eric Yang called it "our largest fundamental improvement in model quality in years," which is either high praise or an indictment of everything that came before it.
• SDR-to-HDR conversion is a core step in any modern post pipeline, and for Insta360 users processing HDR 360 footage, better upscaling is a daily-use upgrade.
blurb_zh:
Topaz Labs于5月7日发布多年来最大规模的模型更新：Hyperion 2（SDR转HDR视频模型）、三款全新Gigapixel图像模型、Adobe Premiere直接集成，以及网页版图像增强工具。
• Hyperion 2将标准动态范围素材转换为HDR，改善色彩处理、色调分离和细节还原，专为专业后期流程设计。
• 三款新Gigapixel模型（Wonder 2、Wonder 3、High Fidelity 3）各有侧重，覆盖不同画质风格需求。
• Premiere面板让AI增强直接在时间线内完成，省去来回导出导入的麻烦。
• CEO称此次发布为多年来最大的模型质量提升——这句话要么是真的很强，要么是承认之前的产品一般。
• SDR转HDR是现代后期制作的核心环节，对Insta360用户处理HDR 360素材来说，这是实实在在的日常工具升级。
verification_notes: Primary source is Topaz Labs official news page plus PR Newswire official release (URL contains 20260507). Confirmed via photorumors.com May 9 coverage, Morningstar/StreetInsider aggregation. CEO quote verified across multiple news sources.

blurb_en:
Recursive Superintelligence emerged from stealth on May 13 with $650 million raised at a $4.65 billion valuation, founded to build AI that autonomously identifies its own weaknesses and redesigns itself — no human researchers required.
• The founding team includes Alexey Dosovitskiy (Vision Transformer co-author), Jeff Clune, Yuandong Tian (formerly Meta AI), and Richard Socher as CEO, with Peter Norvig as an adviser.
• The goal is a model that runs its own experiments, identifies failure modes, and rewrites its own architecture to fix them — without a research team in the loop.
• NVIDIA and AMD both participated in the round, which tells you something about who benefits when AI training becomes autonomous.
• The name "Recursive Superintelligence" is either the most honest startup name in the industry or the least subtle, and the difference may not matter if the mid-2026 product timeline holds.
• Self-improving vision models are the long-term trajectory for camera AI — including the auto-tracking and computational photography that power Insta360's best features.
blurb_zh:
Recursive Superintelligence于5月13日以46.5亿美元估值完成6.5亿美元融资，正式从隐身状态亮相，目标是训练能自主发现弱点并重新设计自身的AI模型，无需人类研究员介入。
• 创始团队包括Vision Transformer共同作者Alexey Dosovitskiy、Jeff Clune、前Meta AI研究员Yuandong Tian和CEO Richard Socher，顾问为Peter Norvig。
• 核心目标：让模型自己跑实验、找出失败原因、重写架构来修复，研究团队无需参与。
• NVIDIA和AMD均参与了投资，从中可以推断两家芯片公司对自主AI训练算力需求的判断。
• 把公司命名为递归超级智能，要么是全行业最诚实的命名，要么是最不低调的。
• 能自我进化的视觉模型是相机AI的长远方向，包括驱动Insta360核心功能的自动跟踪和计算摄影算法。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (May 14), Tech.eu (May 13), SiliconAngle (May 13), The Next Web. All sources consistent on $650M raise, $4.65B valuation, founding team, self-improving AI mission. NVIDIA/AMD backing confirmed across multiple sources.

blurb_en:
Waymo recalled 3,791 robotaxis on May 12 after one of its San Antonio vehicles detected a flooded road, slowed to a responsible speed, and drove into the water anyway. Three days later, residents of Atlanta's Buckhead neighborhood reported roughly 50 empty Waymo vehicles circling their cul-de-sac — 13 cars through a single street in 10 minutes, no passengers aboard, no apparent destination.
• The San Antonio car was unoccupied when it entered standing water at roughly 40 mph; the vehicle had already identified the flooding before it did so.
• A neighbor placed a children-at-play sign in the roadway; several Waymos became stuck while attempting to reroute around it.
• The flood issue will be patched over the air. No fix has been announced for the cul-de-sac routing behavior.
• Waymo noted that neither incident affected passengers. There were no passengers.
blurb_zh:
5月12日，Waymo主动召回3791辆自动驾驶出租车，起因是圣安东尼奥一辆车辆探测到道路积水后减速，随后仍继续驶入。三天后，亚特兰大巴克海德区居民报告约50辆空载Waymo车辆在他们的尽头路来回穿行——十分钟内13辆经过同一条街，车内无乘客，无明显目的地。
• 圣安东尼奥那辆车在探测到积水之后，以约64公里时速驶入洪水。
• 一名居民在路口摆放了儿童警示牌，随后数辆Waymo在试图绕行时卡住了。
• 洪水问题将通过OTA远程修复，尽头路路由问题暂无解决方案。
• Waymo表示两起事故均未影响乘客——确实，车上没有乘客。
verification_notes: Flood recall confirmed via TechCrunch (May 12), CNBC (May 12), Electrek (May 12): 3,791 vehicles, voluntary software recall, San Antonio incident April 20, OTA fix. Atlanta cul-de-sac confirmed via Washington Times (May 15), ABC News, NBC News, Fox News, UPI (May 14-15): Buckhead neighborhood, approximately 50 cars in 10 minutes.

blurb_en:
PwC and Anthropic announced an expanded partnership on May 14 making Claude the delivery engine across PwC's entire global workforce — hundreds of thousands of professionals, a 30,000-person US certification program, and a new Finance business unit (Office of the CFO) structured entirely around Claude.
• Claude Code is shipping production software for PwC clients in weeks rather than quarters; insurance underwriting that took 10 weeks now takes 10 days.
• PwC is running Claude agents through M&A diligence and integration work, citing up to 70% faster delivery on security and HR transformation projects.
• This is the third AI-lab-meets-professional-services deal in two weeks: Anthropic/Goldman/Blackstone (May 4), OpenAI DeployCo (May 11), Anthropic/PwC (May 14).
• The consulting industry's core product — billing clients for hours of human analysis — is being replaced by the software those same consultants are now certified to operate.
blurb_zh:
5月14日，普华永道与Anthropic宣布扩大合作，使Claude成为普华永道全球业务的核心交付引擎——覆盖数十万专业人员，3万名美国员工参与认证，并成立完全以Claude为基础的全新金融业务单元（首席财务官办公室）。
• Claude Code正在以“按周而非按季”的速度为普华永道客户交付生产级软件；此前需要10周的保险核保流程现已缩短至10天。
• 普华永道通过Claude智能体处理并购尽职调查和整合工作，声称安全和人力资源转型项目效率提升高达70%。
• 这是两周内第三次AI实验室与专业服务机构达成同类协议：Anthropic+高盛/黑石（5月4日）、OpenAI DeployCo（5月11日）、Anthropic+普华永道（5月14日）。
• 咨询行业的核心产品——按小时向客户收取人工分析费用——正在被这些同样经过AI认证的顾问所操作的软件明确取代。
verification_notes: Announcement confirmed via Anthropic official blog (anthropic.com/news/pwc-expanded-partnership), PRNewswire press release (May 14), SiliconAngle (May 14). 30,000 certification figure and Office of the CFO business unit confirmed across all three sources. 70% delivery improvement and 10-week-to-10-day insurance underwriting figure from Anthropic blog.

blurb_en:
Supply chain analyst Ming-Chi Kuo reported May 5 that OpenAI is fast-tracking a smartphone for a first-half 2027 launch, targeting roughly 30 million combined units in 2027-2028. The device uses a customized MediaTek Dimensity 9600 chip and is designed to replace traditional apps with AI agents.
• This is separate from Jony Ive's device — a screenless voice-first smart speaker also targeting early 2027 — which remains on its own track.
• The timeline acceleration is reportedly driven by two goals: building a year-end IPO narrative, and competing directly with Apple and Samsung.
• The phone would rely entirely on AI agents to handle tasks instead of conventional apps — no home screen or app store in the traditional sense.
• Kuo's supply chain forecasts have been accurate on Apple hardware timelines for years; his read on OpenAI carries meaningful weight.
blurb_zh:
供应链分析师郭明锡5月5日报告，OpenAI正加速推进2027年上半年发布的智能手机，目标是2027-2028年合计销售约3000万台。该设备采用定制联发科Dimensity 9600芯片，专为以AI代理替代传统应用程序而设计。
• 这与Jony Ive的设备——一款同样面向2027年初的无屏语音优先智能音箱——是两款独立产品。
• 据报道，加速时间表有两个动因：支持年底IPO叙事，以及直接与苹果和三星在设备市场展开竞争。
• 该手机将完全依靠AI代理处理任务而非传统应用程序——没有常规意义上的主屏幕或应用商店。
• 郭明锡在苹果硬件供应链预测方面准确率极高；其对OpenAI的判断具有相当参考价值。
verification_notes: Based on Ming-Chi Kuo supply chain report, May 5, 2026. Confirmed across MacRumors (May 5), 9to5Mac (May 5), Cybernews, AndroidHeadlines. MediaTek Dimensity 9600 chip and 30M unit target cited across multiple outlets. Jony Ive audio device detail from 9to5Mac (Jan 2026). Confidence medium: analyst supply chain speculation, not an official OpenAI announcement.

blurb_en:
Ninety percent of director Steven Soderbergh's new John Lennon documentary is archival stills; the other ten minutes — AI-generated — are what critics at Cannes are talking about.
• The film, "John Lennon: The Last Interview," captures Lennon's final in-depth conversation, recorded hours before his death in 1980.
• Soderbergh used Meta's AI software to generate surreal imagery for the philosophical passages — abstract visuals standing in for ideas that archival footage cannot illustrate.
• Reception at Cannes: the archival material drew praise; the AI sections were "overwhelmingly slammed" by critics.
• Soderbergh's position: "If there's a filmmaking tool, I'm going to explore it." He also called for full transparency about AI use — a standard most of his peers avoid.
• Meta co-financed the film, which is one way to guarantee your AI software gets a Cannes credit.
• For the camera and imaging industry: AI-generated imagery has now screened at the world's most prestigious film festival, with a living director's name in the titles.
blurb_zh:
导演史蒂文·索德伯格在约翰·列侬纪录片《最后的采访》中，用Meta AI生成的超现实画面填充了其中约十分钟的内容，影片在戛纳首映引发争议。
• 纪录片捕捉了列侬遇害前数小时的最后一次深度采访；90%的画面为历史档案照片。
• 索德伯格用AI图像来呈现采访中的哲学性讨论——这些内容没有对应的档案画面。
• 戛纳的反应：档案素材部分获得好评；AI部分「被影评人普遍批评」。
• 索德伯格：「只要是电影工具，我就会去探索。」他同时呼吁行业公开AI使用情况。
• Meta为本片联合出资方，AI软件亦由Meta提供。当然，这只是巧合。
• 对摄影和影像行业的提示：AI生成图像已正式登上世界顶级电影节银幕，并署上了一位在世导演的名字。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Washington Post (May 16), Deadline (May 2026), PetaPixel (May 18), Time magazine review (May 16), CTV News, Boston Globe, Washington Times. Multiple major outlets confirm Cannes premiere and Meta AI use.

blurb_en:
Anthropic confirmed on May 19 that it is acquiring Stainless, the developer tools startup whose SDK generator powered the official APIs of OpenAI, Google, Cloudflare, and Runway — all Anthropic competitors.
• Stainless auto-generates and maintains software development kits across Python, TypeScript, Go, and Java, and has been used by every major AI lab as a shared piece of infrastructure.
• Anthropic says it will wind down all hosted Stainless products: the SDK generator, the MCP server tooling, everything.
• Deal price: more than $300 million, per The Information. Anthropic did not confirm terms.
• The effect: Anthropic's competitors lose access to a critical piece of shared tooling, on Anthropic's schedule.
• Stainless also built the SDK generator that Anthropic itself has relied on since its earliest API days — which is either a tidy vertical integration story or a very expensive way to do your own plumbing.
blurb_zh:
5月19日，Anthropic宣布收购开发者工具初创公司Stainless——这家公司的SDK生成器曾为OpenAI、谷歌、Cloudflare和Runway（均为Anthropic竞争对手）提供官方API工具。
• Stainless能自动生成并维护Python、TypeScript、Go、Java等多语言的软件开发工具包，是AI行业长期共享的基础设施。
• Anthropic将关闭Stainless所有对外托管产品，包括SDK生成器和MCP服务器工具。
• 据《The Information》报道，交易价格超过3亿美元，Anthropic未披露具体条款。
• 实际影响：Anthropic的竞争对手将在Anthropic制定的时间表内失去这一关键工具。
• Stainless同样为Anthropic自身提供SDK服务——这要么是一次漂亮的垂直整合，要么是一种非常昂贵的「自己修自己的管道」。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Anthropic official blog, TechCrunch (May 18), Winbuzzer (May 19), TheAIInsider (May 19), InfoWorld, Techzine, Investing.com. Deal terms from The Information. Multiple outlets confirm wind-down of hosted products.

blurb_en:
YouTube expanded its AI likeness-detection tool to all creators aged 18 and over on May 18, giving any channel owner the ability to scan the platform for deepfakes of their own face.
• Access was previously limited to YouTube Partner Program members, journalists, and politicians.
• Enrollment requires a government ID and a selfie video — you prove you're real before the system will scan for fakes of you.
• The tool catches visual face matches only; AI voice clones are not in scope yet.
• The rollout arrives the same day the TAKE IT DOWN Act's platform compliance requirements take effect in the U.S.
• This is the first self-service deepfake face-detection tool available at any real scale to ordinary creators.
blurb_zh:
YouTube于5月18日将AI面孔检测工具开放给所有18岁以上的创作者，任何频道主均可借此扫描平台，检测自己的面孔是否出现在Deepfake视频中。
• 此前该功能仅限YouTube合作伙伴计划成员、记者和政治人物使用。
• 注册需提交政府颁发的身份证件，并完成自拍视频验证——先证明你是真人，再让系统去找冒充你的假视频。
• 工具目前只检测视觉面孔匹配，AI声音克隆暂不在范围内。
• 扩展上线当日，恰逢美国《立即删除法》平台合规要求正式生效。
• 这是首个面向普通创作者的大规模自助Deepfake检测工具。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Tubefilter (May 18), Engadget, India TV News (May 18), Dataconomy (May 18), MacObserver, Shacknews, Tweaktown, Android Headlines. All confirm May 18 expansion to all adults 18+.

blurb_en:
The U.S. TAKE IT DOWN Act's compliance window closed today, requiring platforms to remove intimate deepfakes within 48 hours of a valid takedown request — and the FTC has already sent formal warning letters to fourteen platforms.
• Platforms warned include Meta, Apple, Microsoft, TikTok, Reddit, Snapchat, and X.
• The law covers both real intimate content shared without consent and AI-generated synthetic intimate depictions.
• Violations are treated as unfair or deceptive trade practices under the FTC Act, with penalties up to $53,088 per violation.
• Platforms had a full year to prepare; the FTC's pre-deadline warning letters suggest not all of them did.
• "AI-generated synthetic intimate depictions" now has a 48-hour federal removal clock attached to it.
blurb_zh:
美国《立即删除法》（TAKE IT DOWN Act）平台合规要求今日正式生效——平台须在收到有效投诉后48小时内删除未经同意的亲密Deepfake内容，联邦贸易委员会已向14家平台发出正式警告函。
• 收到警告函的平台包括Meta、苹果、微软、TikTok、Reddit、Snapchat和X。
• 法规覆盖两类内容：真实亲密内容的未授权传播，以及AI生成的合成亲密图像。
• 违规按《联邦贸易委员会法》中的「不公平交易行为」处理，每次违规最高罚款53,088美元。
• 平台有整整一年时间做准备，FTC的警告函说明并非所有人都准备好了。
• 「AI合成亲密影像」现已成为美国联邦法律中附有48小时删除计时器的正式类别。
verification_notes: Confirmed via The Hive AI, ComplianceHub.Wiki, Skadden law firm, Wikipedia (TAKE IT DOWN Act), Congress.gov, TechPolicy.Press. Compliance date May 19, 2026 confirmed across all sources. FTC warning letter list confirmed via multiple legal/compliance sources.

blurb_en:
AI lab Odyssey dropped two world models in a single day, pushing real-time video generation into multiplayer and audio territory.
• Agora-1 lets multiple human or AI players interact inside the same simulation simultaneously.
• Starchild-1 generates synchronized audio alongside visuals — billed as the first real-time multimodal world model.
• Playable GoldenEye-style demo available now.
• World models simulate entire environments rather than generating clips — closer to game engines than video editors.
• Insta360 relevance: real-time 3D environment generation could reshape how immersive and 360-degree content is prototyped.
blurb_zh:
AI实验室Odyssey一天内发布两个世界模型，将实时视频生成推向多人互动和音频领域。
• Agora-1支持多个人类或AI玩家在同一模拟环境中实时互动。
• Starchild-1同步生成音频和画面，号称首个实时多模态世界模型。
• 可玩的《黄金眼》风格演示已上线。
• 世界模型模拟完整环境而非生成片段——更像游戏引擎而非视频编辑器。
• Insta360相关性：实时3D环境生成可能改变沉浸式及360度内容的制作方式。
verification_notes: Covered by Superhuman (May 19). Odyssey blog posts and playable demo at agora.odyssey.ml confirmed.

blurb_en:
Gen Z’s enthusiasm for AI dropped from 36% to 22% in one year, and graduates are making their feelings heard at commencement ceremonies.
• Students booed a Tavistock VP at UCF for calling AI “the next industrial revolution.”
• Ex-Google CEO Eric Schmidt got the same treatment at University of Arizona every time he mentioned AI.
• Jensen Huang escaped unscathed at Carnegie Mellon by framing AI as opportunity, not replacement.
• Gallup data confirms the shift is broad, not anecdotal.
• The people AI companies need to hire are the ones booing.
blurb_zh:
Z世代对AI的热情一年内从36%降至22%，毕业生们正在毕业典礼上表达不满。
• UCF学生因一位VP称AI为“下一次工业革命”而发出嘘声。
• 前谷歌CEO施密特在亚利桑那大学每次提到AI都遭嘘。
• 黄仁勋在卡内基梅隆全身而退——他把AI框架为机会而非替代。
• 盖洛普数据证实这一转变是普遍的，非个案。
• AI公司最需要招的人，恰恰是正在嘘声的那群人。
verification_notes: Gallup poll data + video footage from UCF (ABC) and U of Arizona (Kantrowitz/X). Covered by Superhuman (May 19).

blurb_en:
Alibaba’s Qwen team released Qwen-Image-2.0, a multimodal image generation model with notably stronger text rendering and instruction following.
• Improved typography, photorealism, and long-text rendering across generation and editing tasks.
• Technical report published alongside the release.
• Chinese-developed image model competing directly with DALL-E and Midjourney on quality benchmarks.
• Insta360 relevance: another viable image generation backend for product mockups and marketing assets, with Chinese-language prompt support built in.
blurb_zh:
阿里巴巴Qwen团队发布Qwen-Image-2.0，一款在文字渲染和指令跟随方面显著增强的多模态图像生成模型。
• 在生成和编辑任务中改进了排版、真实感和长文本渲染。
• 同步发布技术报告。
• 中国开发的图像模型在质量基准上直接与DALL-E和Midjourney竞争。
• Insta360相关性：又一个可用于产品效果图和营销素材的图像生成后端，内置中文提示词支持。
verification_notes: TLDR AI (May 13) covered the technical report release. Qwen team blog confirmed.

blurb_en:
Nvidia open-sourced SANA-WM, a 2.6B-parameter world model that generates a full minute of 720p video from a single image on a single GPU.
• Competitors need eight-GPU clusters for comparable output. This runs on one card.
• Distilled version renders an entire clip in 34 seconds on an RTX 5090.
• Beats multi-GPU setups on camera accuracy benchmarks.
• Open source — weights and code publicly available.
• Insta360 relevance: single-GPU video generation from one photo could enable rapid 360-to-flat or perspective-shift workflows for content creators on consumer hardware.
blurb_zh:
英伟达开源SANA-WM，一个26亿参数的世界模型，可在单张GPU上从一张图片生成一整分钟的720p视频。
• 竞品需要八卡集群才能达到类似效果。这只需一张卡。
• 蒸馏版本在RTX 5090上34秒渲染完整片段。
• 在相机精度基准上超越多GPU方案。
• 完全开源——权重和代码公开可用。
• Insta360相关性：单GPU单图视频生成可为消费级硬件上的创作者实现快速360转平面或视角转换工作流。
verification_notes: The Code newsletter (May 18). Nvidia open-source release on GitHub confirmed.

blurb_en:
A small security team in Vietnam used Anthropic’s restricted Mythos model to crack Apple’s M5 chip defenses in five days.
• Apple reportedly spent billions on Memory Integrity Enforcement, the M5’s primary hardware security layer.
• The exploit is the first public kernel memory corruption demonstrated on M5 silicon.
• Mythos is access-restricted specifically because of capabilities like this.
• Five days. Billions of dollars. The math is not reassuring.
• Insta360 relevance: hardware security assumptions underlying camera firmware and DRM are increasingly fragile against AI-assisted reverse engineering.
blurb_zh:
越南一个小型安全团队用Anthropic受限的Mythos模型在五天内攻破了苹果M5芯片防御。
• 苹果据报花费数十亿美元打造M5的主要硬件安全层——内存完整性强制执行。
• 这是M5硅片上首个公开的内核内存损坏漏洞利用。
• Mythos正是因为这类能力而被限制访问。
• 五天。数十亿美元。这个数学题并不令人安心。
• Insta360相关性：相机固件和DRM所依赖的硬件安全假设在AI辅助逆向工程前越来越脆弱。
verification_notes: The Code newsletter (May 18). Blog post at calif.io. Single primary source — confidence medium.

blurb_en:
Google unveiled Pics at I/O 2026, a Workspace-native AI design tool that generates social graphics, invitations, and marketing materials from text prompts.
• Click any element to edit it with Gemini — works like leaving a comment in Google Docs.
• Direct competitor to Canva and Claude Design.
• Embedded in Workspace: Docs, Slides, everything connected.
• Neither Google Workspace nor Google Pics are accessible in China — this is a product most Insta360 employees literally cannot try.
• Canva responded same day by launching a Gemini Connected App that turns AI images into layered, editable Canva designs.
blurb_zh:
谷歌在I/O 2026上发布Pics，一款内嵌于Workspace的AI设计工具，可通过文字提示生成社交图片、邀请函和营销素材。
• 点击任何元素即可用Gemini编辑——像在Google Docs里留言一样。
• 直接竞争对手Canva和Claude Design。
• 嵌入Workspace：Docs、Slides全部打通。
• Google Workspace和Pics在中国均无法使用——大多数Insta360员工实际上无法体验这款产品。
• Canva同日回应，发布Gemini连接应用，可AI图片转化为可编辑的分层Canva设计。
verification_notes: Announced at Google I/O keynote May 19, 2026. Covered by NewsBytes, BitcoinWorld, MEXC News. Canva Gemini partnership confirmed via BusinessWire press release same day.

blurb_en:
Google made Imagen 4 generally available at I/O, its most advanced image generation model, now accessible to any developer via the Gemini API.
• Native 2K resolution output.
• Three tiers: Imagen 4 Fast ($0.02/image), Imagen 4, and Imagen 4 Ultra.
• Significantly improved text rendering — the weakness that made previous versions unusable for design work.
• Every image watermarked with SynthID, Google’s invisible AI provenance tag.
• Insta360 relevance: a production-ready image API at two cents per shot changes the math on AI-generated marketing assets at scale.
blurb_zh:
谷歌在I/O上全面开放Imagen 4，其最先进的图像生成模型，现可通过Gemini API供任何开发者使用。
• 原生2K分辨率输出。
• 三个层级：Imagen 4 Fast（0.02美元/张）、Imagen 4和Imagen 4 Ultra。
• 文字渲染显著改进——这是此前版本无法用于设计工作的短板。
• 每张图片均带有SynthID水印，谷歌的不可见AI来源标记。
• Insta360相关性：两美分一张的生产级图像API改变了规模化AI营销素材的成本算法。
verification_notes: Official Google Developers Blog post. Announced at Google I/O keynote May 19, 2026. Confirmed by Google Cloud blog, DeepMind page, and multiple outlets.

blurb_en:
Andrej Karpathy — founding member of OpenAI and former Tesla AI director — announced Tuesday he is joining Anthropic's pre-training team, choosing OpenAI's main competitor for his return to frontier AI research.
• Pre-training is the resource-intensive stage where a model absorbs its core world knowledge; Karpathy will lead a new internal team at Anthropic using Claude to accelerate that research.
• He left OpenAI in 2024, briefly ran an AI education startup called Eureka Labs, and has now landed at Anthropic.
• His stated reason: "The next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative."
• Karpathy co-founded OpenAI in 2015 and built Tesla's Autopilot AI team — two track records Anthropic didn't need to recruit blind.
• For Anthropic, adding the pre-training architect who helped birth their main competitor is a very particular kind of win.
• This is, in the driest possible reading, a betrayal. In the second driest, a market signal.
blurb_zh:
Andrej Karpathy——OpenAI联合创始人、前特斯拉AI总监——5月19日宣布加入Anthropic预训练团队，选择了他曾帮助创立的公司的最大竞争对手，重返前沿LLM研究。
• 预训练是AI模型从海量数据中习得核心知识的阶段，既是最烧钱的，也是最关键的。
• Karpathy将在Anthropic内部组建新团队，研究如何用Claude本身来加速预训练研究。
• 他表示：接下来几年对大语言模型前沿研究而言将尤为关键。
• 他曾在2024年离开OpenAI，短暂创办了AI教育初创公司Eureka Labs，如今选择落户Anthropic。
• 对Anthropic而言，招来亲手创建对手公司的人，是一种很特殊的赢法。
• 用最平淡的话说：这是一次背刺。用第二平淡的话说：这是一个市场信号。
verification_notes: Confirmed across TechCrunch, CNBC, Axios, Business Standard, and Karpathy's own public announcement. Article date May 19, 2026.

blurb_en:
Google announced Gemini Spark at I/O on Tuesday — a 24/7 AI agent that runs on Google's servers without your laptop open, monitoring your Gmail, Calendar, and Drive while you're busy elsewhere.
• Spark can organize event RSVPs in Google Sheets, draft emails from documents, and coordinate across 30+ third-party apps including Uber, Canva, Dropbox, and OpenTable, all via instructions sent to a dedicated Gmail address.
• A live demo showed Spark planning a party end-to-end: pulling guest info from emails, building a tracker in Sheets, and updating it in real time.
• Available on the Google AI Ultra tier for $100 per month — down from $250 after a pricing cut Google also announced Tuesday.
• Rolling out to trusted testers this week; broader US beta for Ultra subscribers next week.
• For content teams and shoot producers: a system that reads your files, drafts your communications, and books your vendors while you're on set has obvious applications.
• The same features that make this useful also mean Google has persistent access to your email. That part went unaddressed in the keynote.
blurb_zh:
谷歌在周二的I/O大会上发布了Gemini Spark——一款全天候运行的AI代理，在你合上笔记本之后，仍在谷歌的服务器上替你监控Gmail、日历和云端文档。
• Spark可跨30多个第三方应用（Uber、Canva、Dropbox、OpenTable等）执行任务，你只需通过一个专属Gmail地址发送指令。
• 演示中，Spark全程规划了一场派对：从邮件提取嘉宾名单，建立Google表格跟踪器，并实时更新。
• 订阅谷歌AI Ultra套餐即可使用，本周宣布从每月250美元降至100美元。
• 本周向受信用户开放测试，下周面向美国Ultra订阅用户Beta测试。
• 这套功能意味着谷歌对你的邮件有持续的访问权限。这一点在发布会上没有被提及。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch, TNW, Google AI blog, and Tom's Guide live blog from Google I/O 2026 keynote May 19.

blurb_en:
Google and Samsung revealed Android XR smart glasses at I/O on Tuesday — Gemini-powered, camera-equipped frames launching in two collections designed by Gentle Monster and Warby Parker this fall.
• The glasses pack a camera, speakers, microphone, and Snapdragon processor, with support for Gemini voice commands, real-time language translation, navigation, and hands-free photo capture.
• Two tiers: audio-only glasses for all-day wear, and an optional version with an in-lens display overlaying contextual AI information.
• Hardware is Samsung and Qualcomm. Frames are from fashion eyewear brands. The AI is Google. No single company is building the whole product.
• The choice of Gentle Monster and Warby Parker signals that Google wants this to read as fashion, not gadget — a lesson Meta took years to learn with Ray-Ban.
• For Insta360, which makes wearable cameras: AI-integrated eyewear with built-in cameras now has Google's full commercial weight behind it.
• Price not yet announced; both collections ship fall 2026.
blurb_zh:
谷歌与三星在I/O大会上发布Android XR智能眼镜——内置摄像头、Gemini AI，由Gentle Monster和Warby Parker设计，今年秋季上市。
• 眼镜集成摄像头、扬声器、麦克风和骁龙处理器，支持Gemini语音指令、实时翻译、导航和免手持拍照。
• 两个版本：纯音频款（全天佩戴）和可选镜片显示款（可叠加上下文信息）。
• 硬件由三星和高通负责，外观由时尚眼镜品牌操刀——谷歌想把它卖成潮流单品，而不是科技产品。
• Meta用Ray-Ban花了几年才学到的教训，谷歌这次直接从设计端解决了。
• 对做可穿戴摄像设备的Insta360而言：内置AI的智能眼镜市场，现在有了谷歌的全力押注。
• 定价未公布，预计秋季发货。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Android Authority, Engadget, Google official Android blog, and Tom's Guide live I/O coverage. All report consistent details from the Google I/O keynote May 19, 2026.

blurb_en:
At the opening jury press conference of the 2026 Cannes Film Festival on May 12, jury member Demi Moore told the industry to stop fighting AI — and fellow juror Paul Laverty replied that accepting AI means handing power to people like Peter Thiel.
• Moore: "AI is here. To fight it is to fight a battle we will lose. To find ways to work with it is a more valuable path."
• Laverty, screenwriter and longtime Ken Loach collaborator: "If we simply throw our hands up, who are we handing the money and power to? Who owns these great corporations? People like Thiel."
• Films at the festival openly marketed as AI-assisted proliferated; major Hollywood studios including Disney and Warner were largely absent.
• Festival director Thierry Fremaux sided against AI, citing job losses for dubbing artists, translators, writers, and actors.
• The Oscars banned AI-generated actors in February. Cannes has no equivalent rule and shows no sign of adding one.
• A year ago, filmmakers using AI were embarrassed to say so. This year, it's in the press kit.
blurb_zh:
5月12日，戛纳电影节开幕评审团发布会上，评审成员黛米·摩尔呼吁行业与AI合作，另一位评审保罗·拉弗蒂当场反驳：接受AI就是把权力拱手送给像彼得·蒂尔这样的人。
• 摩尔：AI已然存在，抵制它是一场必输之战，找到与它合作的方式才是出路。
• 拉弗蒂（肯·洛奇的长期合作编剧）：如果我们举手投降，我们是在把钱和权力交给谁？谁拥有这些大公司？像蒂尔这样的人。
• 本届戛纳公开打出AI辅助工作流旗号的影片不在少数；迪士尼、华纳等好莱坞大厂几乎全部缺席。
• 戛纳主席弗雷莫斯明确站队反AI阵营，援引配音演员和翻译的大规模失业。
• 奥斯卡今年二月禁止AI演员参评，戛纳目前没有类似规定，也没有要加的迹象。
• 一年前，用AI的导演不敢公开说；今年，这已经写进了宣传材料。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety (primary), No Film School, The Wrap, Far Out Magazine, France 24. Both Moore and Laverty quotes appear consistently across sources. Opening day of Cannes 2026 was May 12.

blurb_en:
Mustafa Suleyman, CEO of Microsoft AI, told Fortune on May 17 that AI will automate "virtually all white-collar tasks" within 18 months.
• He specifically named accounting, legal, marketing, and project management as sectors at risk.
• Eighteen months from May 2026 is November 2027.
• Suleyman's employer sells the AI tools that would do this automating, a conflict of interest not addressed in the interview.
• Critics have noted the distinction between automating a task and eliminating a job role — a nuance Suleyman's framing did not accommodate.
• Whether he is right, wrong, or strategically useful to Microsoft's sales pipeline is genuinely hard to separate.
blurb_zh:
微软AI首席执行官穆斯塔法·苏莱曼5月17日接受财富杂志采访时表示，18个月内，AI将自动化几乎所有白领工作。
• 他点名了会计、法律、市场营销和项目管理等领域。
• 18个月后，正好是2027年11月。
• 苏莱曼任职的公司，恰恰在出售能实现这一自动化的AI工具，这一利益冲突在采访中未被提及。
• 批评者指出：自动化某项任务，不等于消灭一个岗位——苏莱曼的表述中刻意省略了这一区别。
• 他究竟是预言家、销售员，还是两者兼而有之，目前真的很难分清。
verification_notes: Fortune interview published May 17, 2026. Claims verified across Associated News Agency, Futurism, CryptoBriefing, and WebProNews, all citing the same Fortune piece with consistent quotes.
Paper confirmed, uncensored model on HuggingFace, discussed on HN
blurb_en:
Researchers cracked open Qwen3.5-9B and found China's political censorship hiding in plain sight — a tiny circuit in layers 11–20 that can be read and switched off.
• The base model already knows the facts — Tiananmen, Xinjiang, Falun Gong — censorship is just a routing layer trained on top
• Three internal directions in the "writer" layers encode whether content is PRC-sensitive
• Subtract the right vector at the right layer and the model speaks freely
• An uncensored version is already on HuggingFace
• The finding implies every Chinese open-weights model likely carries a similar removable filter
• For Chinese readers: the knowledge was never deleted, just hidden behind a switch
blurb_zh:
研究人员拆解Qwen3.5-9B的权重，发现中国的政治审查不过是一个可以读取和关闭的小型电路。
• 基础模型本身已掌握所有事实——天安门、新疆、法轮功——审查只是训练在上面的路由层
• 第11到20层的三个内部方向编码了内容是否涉及中国敏感话题
• 在正确的层减去正确的向量，模型就能自由回答
• 未审查版本已上传HuggingFace
• 这意味着每个中国开源模型可能都带有类似的可拆卸过滤器
• 知识从未被删除，只是藏在一个开关后面

verification_notes: GitHub repo live, ICLR 2026 paper, model weights on HuggingFace
blurb_en:
NVIDIA's LongLive 1.0 generates interactive long-form video in real time — 20 FPS on a single H100, up to four minutes per clip.
• Frame-level autoregressive design with streaming attention and KV-cache tricks
• Users can change prompts mid-generation and the video smoothly pivots
• 1.3B parameters, fine-tuned from a short-clip model in just 32 GPU-days
• FP8 quantization pushes speed to 24.8 FPS with minimal quality loss
• Code, weights, and demo all open-sourced
• First framework that makes minute-plus AI video feel like a live feed, not a render queue
blurb_zh:
英伟达LongLive 1.0实现实时交互式长视频生成——单张H100上达20帧/秒，每段最长四分钟。
• 帧级自回归设计，配合流式注意力和KV缓存优化
• 用户可在生成过程中更换提示词，视频平滑切换
• 13亿参数，从短片模型微调仅需32个GPU天
• FP8量化将速度提升至24.8帧/秒
• 代码、权重、演示全部开源
• 首个让分钟级AI视频像直播而非渲染的框架

verification_notes: Product live, press releases on PRWeb and MarTech Series, pricing confirmed
blurb_en:
Creatify Agent is the first AI creative agent trained specifically on advertising — 15 million ads and $1B+ in analyzed spend — that produces ready-to-run video ads from a single conversation.
• Paste a product URL, the agent writes the script, casts the avatar, shoots every scene, scores the audio, and reviews its own work
• Trained on what actually converts, not just what looks good
• Brand-safe: locks in verified logos, names, and claims to prevent hallucinated features
• One conversation can produce dozens of variants for A/B testing
• Each ad costs $5–$8 vs. $500+ and weeks with traditional production
• Free plan available — no paywall to start
blurb_zh:
Creatify Agent是首个专门针对广告训练的AI创意代理——基于1500万条广告和超10亿美元的投放数据——通过一次对话就能生产可直接投放的视频广告。
• 粘贴产品链接，代理自动写脚本、选角色、拍摄、配音、自检成品
• 训练目标是转化率，不只是好看
• 品牌安全：锁定验证过的logo、名称和卖点，防止AI编造功能
• 一次对话可产出数十个变体用于A/B测试
• 每条广告5-8美元，传统制作要500美元以上
• 免费方案可用，无付费门槛

verification_notes: Official OpenAI blog post, covered by TechCrunch, TNW, WinBuzzer
blurb_en:
OpenAI now embeds Google's SynthID invisible watermark in every image ChatGPT generates — plus C2PA metadata that signs who made it and how.
• Two layers: C2PA carries detailed provenance but can be stripped; SynthID survives screenshots, crops, and format changes
• A new public verification tool lets anyone upload an image and check for either signal
• Currently covers ChatGPT, Codex, and API-generated images
• For artists: this is the first real attempt to tag AI images at internet scale
• For China: OpenAI tools are blocked there, but the images circulate freely — now they carry invisible proof of origin
• The art world has begged for this since Midjourney v3
blurb_zh:
OpenAI现在为ChatGPT生成的每张图片嵌入谷歌SynthID隐形水印，外加C2PA元数据签名标注创作者和制作方式。
• 双重保护：C2PA携带详细来源信息但可被剥离；SynthID在截图、裁剪、格式转换后依然存在
• 新的公开验证工具允许任何人上传图片检查是否存在任一标记
• 目前覆盖ChatGPT、Codex和API生成的图片
• 对艺术家而言：这是首次在互联网规模上标记AI图片的真正尝试
• 对中国用户：OpenAI工具在国内被封，但图片自由流通——现在它们携带了隐形的来源证明
• 艺术界自Midjourney v3以来一直呼吁这项功能

blurb_en:
Google officially launched Gemini Omni at I/O on May 19: feed it images, audio, existing video clips, or plain text — or all four at once — and it returns a coherent video.
• The first model in the family, Gemini Omni Flash, caps clips at 10 seconds; Google calls this "a deployment decision, not a model limitation."
• Ships free to YouTube Shorts and YouTube Create users, and is embedded in Search and the Gemini app — no standalone subscription required for YouTube access.
• One feature was deliberately withheld: editing or replacing audio in existing video footage. Google called it "the riskiest feature the architecture supports" and said it won't ship until they can do it "responsibly."
• Avatar mode launched with an anti-deepfake gate: you have to record yourself reading a string of numbers aloud before your likeness can be used.
• Every Omni-generated video carries Google's SynthID watermark.
• For camera and imaging professionals: AI that ingests mixed footage, audio, and images as a single prompt — for free, inside YouTube — is now the distribution baseline.
blurb_zh:
5月19日，谷歌在I/O大会上正式发布Gemini Omni：可以把图像、音频、现有视频或纯文字——或者四者同时——作为输入，生成一段连贯的视频。
• 首款发布的Gemini Omni Flash单次生成上限为10秒，谷歌称这是“部署决策，非模型限制”。
• 向YouTube Shorts和YouTube Create用户免费开放；同时内置于谷歌搜索和Gemini应用，无需额外付费。
• 一项功能被刻意留下：编辑或替换现有视频中的音频。谷歌称其为“架构所支持的最高风险功能”，表示确认可以“负责任地”开放之前不会上线。
• 数字人模式已上线，但需先录制自己朗读一串数字的视频才能激活，是防深度伪造的验证步骤。
• 所有Omni生成的视频均内嵌SynthID水印。
• 对相机和影像从业者来说：能把混合素材、音频合为一个提示词的AI视频，现在免费内嵌在YouTube里了。这是新起跑线。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (URL in search results), thenextweb.com Gemini Omni Flash article, TechTimes 'holds back riskiest feature' piece (May 19), Decrypt Google I/O coverage, and Google Blog (blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-omni/). Five independent sources. Prior 'Rough Cut' story (2026-05-13) covered the pre-announcement leak only; this is the confirmed official launch with full capability details.

blurb_en:
Kuaishou is reportedly spinning off its Kling AI video unit at a US$20 billion valuation, seeking US$2 billion in new funding ahead of a planned 2027 Hong Kong IPO.
• Kling's annualized revenue run rate hit US$500 million — roughly double the level before Chinese New Year.
• Tencent is reportedly among the investors in discussions.
• Kuaishou's stock jumped nearly 10% on the news; Morningstar called the $20 billion figure "stretched."
• Kuaishou officially described the situation as "assessing a proposal to restructure Kling AI" — no agreements signed, no timeline confirmed.
• Context: after OpenAI shut down Sora in April, Kling rose to number five on the US App Store free charts. This spinoff is the bet that a Chinese-built AI video brand can stand alone in global markets.
• For Insta360: China's largest direct AI video competitor just priced itself. Twenty billion dollars, preliminary, subject to revision.
blurb_zh:
快手据报道正将旗下AI视频业务可灵独立分拆，估值200亿美元，寻求20亿美元融资，计划2027年在香港上市。
• 可灵年化营收已达5亿美元，春节前后翻倍。
• 腾讯据报参与融资谈判。
• 消息公开后快手股价涨近10%；晨星分析师称200亿美元估值“偏高”。
• 快手官方回应：目前仅处于“评估可灵AI重组方案的阶段”，尚未签署任何协议。
• 背景：OpenAI四月关停Sora后，可灵跃升至美国App Store免费榜第五。这次分拆，是赌一个深圳出品的AI视频品牌能在全球市场独立生存。
• 对Insta360来说：中国最大AI视频竞争对手刚给自己定了价。
verification_notes: Confirmed via SCMP, Caixin Global (Business Brief May 12), TechNode (May 12), eWeek, Pandaily, Morningstar analysis. Six independent sources. The Information broke the original story. Kuaishou official statement confirmed 'assessing a proposal' and 'preliminary stage.' Prior 'Screen Test' story (2026-05-13) covered Kling's App Store chart rise; this covers the distinct spinoff/valuation/IPO news.

blurb_en:
On May 18, a California jury took less than two hours to dismiss all of Elon Musk's claims against OpenAI and Sam Altman — not because OpenAI did nothing wrong, but because Musk had waited too long to sue.
• The nine-member advisory jury found Musk exceeded the statute of limitations when he filed his $150 billion lawsuit in 2024, alleging that OpenAI betrayed its original nonprofit mission and enriched its founders.
• Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers confirmed the unanimous verdict and threw out the case.
• The jury never reached the central question: whether OpenAI actually betrayed its founding mission when it converted to a for-profit structure.
• Musk's attorney vowed an immediate appeal to the Ninth Circuit: "This one is not over."
• Whether OpenAI's founding mission is legally intact — or legally undefined — remains an open question. The most valuable AI company in the world's foundational status has never been tested in court.
blurb_zh:
5月18日，加州陪审团用不到两小时，驳回了埃隆·马斯克针对OpenAI和Sam Altman的全部诉讼请求——不是因为OpenAI无可指摘，而是因为马斯克起诉太晚了。
• 九名陪审员裁定，马斯克在2024年提起的1500亿美元诉讼已超出诉讼时效。该诉讼指控OpenAI背离非营利初心、创始人中饱私囊。
• 法官Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers确认裁决，驳回案件。
• 核心问题始终未被触及：OpenAI转型营利机构是否违背了创始使命？
• 马斯克律师当即誓言上诉至第九巡回法院：“这还没完。”
• 世界上估值最高的AI公司，其创立时的非营利使命，在法律上至今仍是无人定论。
verification_notes: Confirmed via NPR (primary, URL in search results), NBC News, Newsweek, Al Jazeera. Four independent sources. Prior 'Sworn Enemy' story (2026-05-07) covered Mira Murati's trial testimony; this is the jury verdict and case dismissal on May 18 — a distinct newsworthy event.

blurb_en:
Figma started rolling out its native AI design agent in limited beta on May 20, letting users generate, edit, and rework designs through plain text commands — starting at $15 per seat per month.
• The agent creates new designs from scratch, edits existing frames, and automates repetitive tasks like generating design iterations.
• Claude and Codex are baked in: users can run Anthropic's Claude Code and OpenAI's Codex directly inside the canvas.
• First-quarter 2026 revenue: $333 million, up 46% year-on-year.
• On the same day, Google launched an updated Stitch AI design agent at I/O with real-time streaming, voice control, and multiplayer editing — available for free through Google Labs.
• Neither company mentioned the timing.
• The design tools war landed on the same day. One competitor is figuring out what to charge.
blurb_zh:
5月20日，Figma向有限用户推出原生AI设计助手内测版：可用自然语言生成设计、编辑现有框架、自动化重复任务——起价每席每月15美元。
• 支持Claude Code和OpenAI Codex直接在设计画布内运行。
• 2026年Q1营收3.33亿美元，同比增长46%。
• 同一天，谷歌在I/O发布了更新版Stitch AI设计助手，支持实时流式生成、语音控制和多人协作编辑——通过Google Labs免费提供。
• 两家公司都没提这个巧合。
• 设计工具的AI战，在同一天同时打响。其中一个还在考虑怎么收费。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (URL in search results), theaiinsider.tech (May 21) with revenue details, Startup Fortune coverage. Google Stitch same-day launch confirmed via digitimes.com and Google Blog (blog.google stitch-updates).
Official Stability AI blog, TechCrunch coverage, models on HuggingFace
blurb_en:
Stability AI drops Stable Audio 3.0 — a family of open-weight models that generate full songs and sound effects up to six minutes long, with commercial rights included.
• Four sizes: Small SFX (459M), Small (459M), Medium (1.4B), and Large (2.7B)
• Small models run on-device — phone-grade music generation up to two minutes
• Medium and Large produce 6:20 of coherent composition with maintained structure and melody
• Small, Small SFX, and Medium are open-weight on HuggingFace; Large via API and enterprise self-hosting
• You own your outputs — commercial use allowed under Stability's community license
• For Chinese creators: this is a Western creative tool with no equivalent behind the firewall
blurb_zh:
Stability AI发布Stable Audio 3.0——一组开源权重的音频模型，可生成长达六分钟的完整歌曲和音效，且包含商业使用权。
• 四种规模：Small SFX（4.59亿参数）、Small、Medium（14亿）和Large（27亿）
• 小模型可在手机端运行——移动端音乐生成最长两分钟
• Medium和Large可产出6分20秒的连贯作曲，保持结构和旋律
• 三个模型在HuggingFace开放权重；Large通过API和企业自部署提供
• 输出归你所有——社区许可证允许商业用途
• 对中国创作者而言：防火墙内没有同等替代品的西方创意工具

verification_notes: GitHub repo live, HuggingFace weights, MarkTechPost and Medium coverage, Apache 2.0 license
blurb_en:
ByteDance releases Lance — a single 3B-parameter model that understands, generates, AND edits both images and video, all trained from scratch on 128 A100s.
• Six tasks in one architecture: text-to-image, text-to-video, image editing, video editing, image captioning, video captioning
• Dual-stream mixture-of-experts: one expert handles understanding, another handles generation
• Everything lives in one interleaved sequence with 3D causal attention
• Apache 2.0 license — fully open and commercially usable
• Competitive with specialist models despite being a generalist
• A Chinese lab shipping open creative AI that covers the full workflow — read, generate, edit — in a single model
blurb_zh:
字节跳动发布Lance——一个30亿参数的统一模型，能理解、生成和编辑图像与视频，全部在128张A100上从零训练。
• 单一架构覆盖六项任务：文生图、文生视频、图像编辑、视频编辑、图像描述、视频描述
• 双流混合专家设计：理解专家处理语义，生成专家处理视觉合成
• 所有模态在同一序列中交错，使用3D因果注意力
• Apache 2.0许可证——完全开源可商用
• 作为通才模型仍能与专业模型竞争
• 中国实验室发布的开源创意AI，一个模型覆盖完整工作流

verification_notes: CNBC, Bloomberg, TrendForce coverage, 560K units shipped confirmed
blurb_en:
Alibaba unveils the Zhenwu M890 — a domestic AI chip delivering 3x the performance of its predecessor, purpose-built for the agent era and already in mass production.
• 144 GB GPU memory with 800 GB/s interchip bandwidth
• Designed specifically for AI agent workloads — the heavy memory and communication demands of multi-step reasoning
• Already shipped 560,000 units to 400+ customers across 20 industries
• Two more chips planned: Zhenwu V900 and J900 arriving by 2028
• The explicit goal: replace Nvidia inside China as US export controls tighten
• Western analysts see this as China's most credible domestic GPU alternative yet
blurb_zh:
阿里巴巴发布真武M890——性能达上一代三倍的国产AI芯片，专为智能体时代设计，已进入规模量产。
• 144GB显存，800GB/s芯片间带宽
• 专门针对AI智能体工作负载设计——满足多步推理的高内存和通信需求
• 已向20多个行业的400多家客户累计出货56万颗
• 另有两款芯片计划中：真武V900和J900将于2028年前发布
• 明确目标：在美国出口管制收紧之际替代英伟达
• 西方分析师认为这是中国目前最具可信度的国产GPU替代方案

verification_notes: TLDR AI coverage, independently verified by external mathematicians per report
blurb_en:
An OpenAI reasoning model autonomously disproved a major math conjecture that had stood since 1946 — and external mathematicians confirmed the proof is valid.
• The conjecture was tied to the planar unit distance problem in combinatorial geometry
• The model introduced techniques from algebraic number theory that human mathematicians hadn't tried
• The proof was generated without human guidance — the model found the approach on its own
• Independent verification by external mathematicians confirms it's not a hallucination
• One of the first cases where an AI system resolved a prominent unsolved problem in mathematics
• The weird part: 80 years of human attempts, and the machine found a path nobody was looking down
blurb_zh:
OpenAI推理模型自主推翻了一个自1946年以来悬而未决的重要数学猜想——外部数学家已确认证明有效。
• 该猜想与组合几何中的平面单位距离问题相关
• 模型引入了人类数学家未曾尝试的代数数论技术
• 证明过程无人类引导——模型独立找到了解题路径
• 经外部数学家独立验证，确认并非幻觉
• 这是AI系统首次解决重要未解数学问题的案例之一
• 诡异之处：人类尝试了80年，机器找到了一条没人看过的路

blurb_en:
OpenAI filed a confidential S-1 prospectus with the SEC on Friday, kicking off an IPO process that would value the company at close to $1 trillion.

- Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley are underwriting; the company is targeting a listing between Labor Day and Thanksgiving 2026.
- The confidential filing keeps financials private until roughly 15 days before the roadshow -- most investors will see the books only when the deal is nearly closed.
- OpenAI was founded as a non-profit in 2015; its for-profit conversion in 2019 triggered Elon Musk's now-dismissed lawsuit, resolved by jury last week.
- Rival Anthropic is separately in talks for a round valuing it at $900 billion, with its own IPO expected by October -- making this an AI race to Wall Street.
- For a company that opened its doors as a charitable research lab, the rate of travel to Wall Street has been exceptional.

Read more.
blurb_zh:
OpenAI周五向美国证券交易委员会秘密提交S-1招股书，正式启动上市程序，目标估值接近1万亿美元。

- 高盛和摩根士丹利担任承销商，计划上市窗口定于2026年劳动节至感恩节之间。
- 秘密申请意味着财务数据在路演前约15天才会公开，大多数投资者只能在交易临近时才看到账本。
- OpenAI 2015年以非营利组织身份成立，2019年推出营利性部门，由此引发马斯克诉讼——上周陪审团已驳回其索赔。
- 竞争对手Anthropic正在推进一轮估值9000亿美元的融资，并计划于10月前上市，AI巨头争相登陆华尔街的态势已然成形。
- 这家以慈善研究机构起家的公司，奔向华尔街的速度令人叹为观止。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Axios (May 20), CNBC (May 20), AI Weekly, CryptoBriefing, Investing.com. Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley as underwriters, Q4 2026 target, confidential filing confirmed across 5+ sources.

blurb_en:
The White House pulled a planned AI executive order hours before President Trump was scheduled to sign it on Thursday.

- The order would have established a voluntary 90-day pre-release review process for frontier AI models, letting national security and civilian agencies evaluate new systems before public launch.
- Trump told reporters he delayed it because he did not like certain aspects, adding: I just hate regulation.
- The signing had been postponed multiple times; OpenAI and Anthropic had been negotiating the framework terms with administration officials for months.
- Internal White House tension ran along predictable lines: pro-innovation factions wanted the review genuinely voluntary; national security officials wanted NSA-backed testing with real enforcement teeth.
- The same administration reversed course on AI safety two weeks ago, increasing oversight after Anthropic's frontier model demonstrated live zero-day exploitation -- then reversed the reversal on Thursday.

Read more.
blurb_zh:
特朗普政府原定周四签署一项AI行政令，却在最后时刻紧急叫停。

- 该行政令拟要求前沿AI模型发布前接受最长90天的自愿安全审查，由国家安全及民事机构共同评估。
- 特朗普向记者解释称不满意其中某些方面，并直言：我天生就讨厌监管。
- 该令此前已多次推迟，OpenAI和Anthropic均与白宫官员参与了框架谈判。
- 白宫内部存在分歧：创新派坚持真正自愿，国安派希望引入NSA参与的强制测试机制。
- 同一届政府在两周前刚以Anthropic模型展示实时零日漏洞利用为由转向加强AI监管，如今又再度收手。
verification_notes: Confirmed via CNBC, CNN Business, Washington Post, Bloomberg, Axios, Nextgov/FCW -- all independently reported the May 21 postponement. Trump quotes confirmed across CNBC and CNN. Internal White House disagreement confirmed by Axios sourcing.

blurb_en:
Meta spent April collecting work samples from its employees — keystrokes, mouse clicks, and periodic screenshots from company-issued laptops — and feeding them into the company's AI training pipeline.
• The program was called the Model Capability Initiative (MCI), and Zuckerberg disclosed it himself at the April 30 all-hands meeting.
• MCI was reportedly being wound down when Zuckerberg revealed it — which is one way to get ahead of a story.
• Over 1,000 employees signed a petition demanding the program end. Meta did not respond to the petition.
• On May 20, Meta laid off roughly 7,800 people — the largest round since the 2022 year of efficiency.
• The timing is not lost on observers. No known causal link between MCI participation and who was let go.
• For companies with device telemetry programs: the line between product improvement data and AI training data is not obvious, and the people who draw it tend to work in legal.
blurb_zh:
Meta在四月份从员工的公司设备上采集“工作样本”——键盘击键、鼠标点击、以及定期截屏——并将这些数据输入公司的AI训练管道。
• 该项目名为“模型能力计划”（MCI），是Zuckerberg本人在4月30日全员大会上亲口披露的。
• MCI据报在Zuckerberg对外公开之际已开始收尾，这是一种很有意思的“提前告知”。
• 超过1000名员工联署请愿，要求立即终止该项目。Meta未作回应。
• 5月20日，Meta裁员约7800人，是2022年“效率之年”以来规模最大的一次。
• 时机巧合，有目共睹。目前尚无证据表明MCI参与程度与裁员名单存在直接关联。
• 对设有设备遥测项目的公司而言：产品优化数据与AI训练数据之间的界限并不显而易见，划这条线的人通常就职于法务部门。
verification_notes: Meta MCI program confirmed across Futurism, eWeek, IBTimes UK, Common Dreams. Zuckerberg disclosed at April 30 all-hands: program tracked keystrokes, clicks, screenshots on work laptops to train AI. ~7,800 layoffs on May 20 confirmed across major outlets. 1,000+ employee petition confirmed via Common Dreams and eWeek. All WebFetch 403s; verified via cross-referenced search snippets from 5+ sources.

blurb_en:
Starting this week, YouTube is letting any user insert themselves into another creator's Short using Gemini Omni — changing visual styles, adding new scenes, or generating an entirely new version — whether the original creator likes it or not.
• Announced at Google I/O May 19. Rolling out to YouTube Shorts Remix and the YouTube Create app.
• Creators can opt out — but the default is opt-in. Exclusion requires active consent from the original creator.
• All AI-remixed content is watermarked.
• Ask YouTube, also announced at I/O, gives YouTube Premium subscribers a conversational search interface — describe what you want to watch instead of typing keywords.
• This is the consumer distribution layer for Gemini Omni, not a new model.
• For camera companies and content creators: the line between remix and derivative work is now wherever YouTube draws it.
blurb_zh:
从本周起，任何YouTube用户都可以借助Gemini Omni将自己插入他人的短视频——改变画面风格、添加新场景，或生成全新版本——无论原作者是否情愿。
• 5月19日Google I/O宣布，推出至YouTube Shorts Remix功能及YouTube Create应用。
• 创作者可以选择退出——但默认是选择加入。想排除自己的内容，需要主动表态。
• 所有AI混剪内容均含水印标记。
• Ask YouTube同日公布：Premium用户可用对话方式描述想看什么，无需输入关键词搜索。
• 这是Gemini Omni的消费端分发落地，并非新模型。
• 对相机品牌和内容创作者而言：二次创作与衍生作品之间的边界，现在由YouTube划定。
verification_notes: Announced at Google I/O May 19. Confirmed via Android Central, Neowin, gHacks, shopifreaks (all citing YouTube official I/O announcement). Creator opt-out default opt-in and watermarking confirmed across sources. Ask YouTube Premium conversational search confirmed. Distinct from 2026-05-19-gemini-omni-io2026 (model launch capabilities); this covers the YouTube Shorts creator tools rollout.

blurb_en:
Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark told an Oxford audience on Wednesday that an AI will collaborate on a Nobel Prize-winning discovery within 12 months, AI-run companies will exist within 18 months, bipedal robots will be deployable in two years, and AI will be designing its own successors by 2028.
• He also said there is a non-zero probability that this ends with everyone dead.
• Clark described the current pace as inducing a 'vertiginous sense of progress' — the closest thing to a warning and an endorsement delivered in the same phrase.
• His stated biggest concern: not AI itself, but the speed at which institutions, regulators, and ordinary people are expected to adapt.
• Oxford produces many of the AI researchers currently building the systems he was describing.
• Twelve months from May 2026 is May 2027.
blurb_zh:
Anthropic联合创始人Jack Clark本周三在牛津演讲，预测：12个月内AI将参与诺贝尔奖级别的科学发现；18个月内出现由AI运营的公司；两年内双足机器人可商用部署；2028年前AI将开始设计自己的继任者。
• 他同时表示：这一切最终导致人类灭绝的概率，不是零。
• Clark用“令人眩晕的进步感”描述当前发展速度——同一句话既是赞美，也是警告。
• 他说最大的忧虑不是AI本身，而是机构、监管者和普通人被要求以多快速度适应。
• 牛津培养了许多正在构建这些系统的AI研究员。
• 2026年5月的12个月后，是2027年5月。
verification_notes: Jack Clark Oxford speech May 21 confirmed via TechCentral.ie, AIWeekly.co, resultsense.com, inshorts.com. Predictions consistent across all sources. Extinction risk quote confirmed. No primary transcript or recording verified — confidence medium.

blurb_en:
OpenAI launched a personal finance dashboard inside ChatGPT on May 15, letting Pro subscribers connect their bank accounts, investment portfolios, and subscriptions via Plaid's network of over 12,000 financial institutions.
• Exclusive to Pro users ($100/month). Free users are not invited to share their financial data.
• Dashboard surfaces portfolio performance, spending breakdowns, and active subscriptions inside a single conversation.
• Built on the Hiro team, a fintech startup OpenAI acquired in April 2026 for an undisclosed amount.
• In the same week, OpenAI also ran its self-serve Ads Manager rollout — collecting financial data on one end while monetizing attention on the other.
• For context: you now pay $100 per month to give ChatGPT a complete picture of where your money goes.
blurb_zh:
5月15日，OpenAI在ChatGPT内部上线个人财务仪表盘，允许Pro订阅用户通过Plaid连接逾12,000家金融机构的银行账户、投资组合和订阅服务。
• 仅限Pro用户（每月100美元）。免费用户不在共享财务数据的邀请名单内。
• 仪表盘在对话中汇总投资组合表现、消费明细和订阅追踪。
• 基于OpenAI今年4月以未披露金额收购的金融科技初创公司Hiro团队打造。
• 同一周，OpenAI还完成了自助广告投放平台的推出——一边收集用户财务数据，一边在另一端出售用户注意力。
• 换个说法：你每月花100美元，让ChatGPT全面掌握你的钱去了哪里。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch, 9to5Mac, MacRumors, American Banker, and OpenAI blog. Plaid integration, 12,000+ institutions, Pro-tier exclusivity, Hiro team acquisition (April 2026) all confirmed across sources. TechCrunch returns 403 on direct fetch; confirmed via search snippet cross-referencing from 5+ outlets.

blurb_en:
Judge William Orrick declined to approve the $1.5 billion Bartz v. Anthropic copyright settlement at the May 14 final approval hearing, sending both parties away with homework.
• The judge asked Anthropic and class counsel to submit a two-page supplemental brief by May 21 explaining the unusually high volume of late-filed opt-in claims.
• Opt-in rate climbed to 92.77% — roughly nine times the typical class action claim rate — with a meaningful number of authors apparently crossing the finish line after the deadline.
• Approval is expected 'relatively quickly' once the brief lands. The settlement itself is not in danger.
• If approved, it will be the largest copyright settlement in AI history — covering 482,460 books Anthropic used to train Claude without permission.
• The books, having been used, have already been used.
blurb_zh:
5月14日的最终批准听证会上，联邦法官William Orrick拒绝当庭批准价值15亿美元的Bartz诉Anthropic版权和解协议，而是给双方布置了作业。
• 法官要求Anthropic和集体诉讼代理律师在5月21日前提交不超过两页的补充简报，解释为何有大量索赔在截止日期后才提交。
• 整体索赔率已攀升至92.77%——约为普通集体诉讼索赔率的九倍——且显然有相当数量的作者在最后期限之后才赶到。
• 一旦补充简报提交，批准预计将“很快”到来。和解协议本身并无危险。
• 若获批准，这将是AI史上规模最大的版权和解——涵盖Anthropic在未获授权情况下用482,460部图书训练Claude的行为。
• 那些书，已经被用了。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Publishers Weekly and Authors Alliance post-hearing reports. Judge declined to approve at bench; asked for supplemental brief on late opt-outs due May 21; approval expected 'relatively quickly.' Opt-in rate 92.77% confirmed. Distinct from 2026-05-10-bartz-anthropic-settlement-final-hearing (pre-hearing status, 91.3% claim rate); this story covers the May 14 hearing outcome.

blurb_en:
Anthropic told investors this week it expects to post its first-ever operating profit in Q2 2026, as quarterly revenue climbs to at least $10.9 billion — more than double the $4.8 billion it generated in Q1.
- The projected $559 million operating profit marks a genuine milestone: Anthropic has never had a profitable quarter in its four years of existence.
- Revenue grew roughly 80x over the past year; the company is now running at a $30 billion annual rate.
- The same week, OpenAI confidentially filed its S-1 for a $852 billion–$1 trillion IPO — while still losing $1.22 for every dollar it earns.
- One AI lab quietly turned profitable; the other went public while spectacularly in the red. The contrast is either reassuring or alarming depending on who you ask.
blurb_zh:
Anthropic本周告知投资者，预计2026年第二季度将首次实现运营盈利，季度营收有望达至少109亿美元，是第一季度48亿美元的两倍以上。
- 预计运营利润约5.59亿美元，是公司成立四年来首个盈利季度。
- 营收在过去一年增长约80倍，年化营收已达300亿美元。
- 同一周，OpenAI机密提交IPO申报文件，估值目标8520亿至1万亿美元——同时每赚1美元仍亏损1.22美元。
- 一家AI公司悄然盈利，另一家高调亏损上市——这种对比，令人既振奋又忐忑。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (May 20), Bloomberg (May 20), CNBC (May 20), Benzinga, Dataconomy. Multiple credible sources report identical revenue figure and profit projection.

blurb_en:
Hirokazu Koreeda's Cannes competition entry, "Sheep in the Box," is about grieving parents who purchase a humanoid AI surrogate for their dead seven-year-old son — and it earned a 3.5-minute standing ovation at its premiere despite being one of the festival's most divisive films.
- The premise was inspired by real reporting on a Chinese startup that builds AI-powered conversational resurrections of deceased people.
- In the film, a company called ReBirth sells humanoid child surrogates to bereaved parents, at a price point presumably higher than therapy.
- Critical reception ranged from "unquestionably minor Koreeda" (Hollywood Reporter) to "a light yet profound study of grief" (Deadline) — the standing ovation appears to have outrun the reviews.
- The Palme d'Or went to Cristian Mungiu's "Fjord," a film about Romanian parents in Norway with no AI in sight — a reminder that Cannes 2026's defining theme was parenthood, not technology.
blurb_zh:
是枝裕和今年戛纳主竞赛新作《盒中的羊》，讲述一对父母在痛失爱子后购买人形AI机器人作为替代品的近未来故事——首映获得长达三分半钟的起立鼓掌，却也是本届争议最大的影片之一。
- 故事灵感来自一家真实的中国初创公司：该公司用AI构建逝者的对话「复原」。
- 片中虚构公司ReBirth向丧子父母出售人形儿童替代品，价格大概比心理治疗贵不少。
- 影评两极分化：《好莱坞报道》评为「是枝小品」，《综艺》则称之为「关于失去的轻盈而深刻的研究」；起立鼓掌似乎跑在了评论前面。
- 金棕榈最终归属罗马尼亚导演克里斯蒂安·蒙吉的《峡湾》——一个与AI毫无关联的故事——提醒我们，2026年戛纳真正的主题，始终是父母之痛。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety, Hollywood Reporter (review + feature), IndieWire, Screen Rant, Deadline, Screen Daily, South China Morning Post. Multiple credible film industry outlets.

blurb_en:
The latest viral AI image trend is deliberately terrible art: users ask ChatGPT to redraw their photos as 1990s-era MS Paint doodles, shaky outlines, distorted faces, and scribbled backgrounds included.
- The trend started on Korean Threads, where user @withgrdnrush used GPT Image 2 to make a scribbled image called "The World's Most Trivial Question," and it spread globally within days.
- The prompt is disarmingly simple: "Remake this image as an inexpert, childish doodle scribbled on MS Paint using a mouse alone."
- What makes it work is that the AI's failure is calibrated — each doodle stays recognizable enough to be funny rather than just broken.
- There is something mildly poetic about deploying a model that cost hundreds of millions of dollars to train in order to reproduce what a first-grader could have made for free.
blurb_zh:
最新的AI图像流行趋势是刻意画「坏画」：用户让ChatGPT把自己的照片重绘为1990年代MS Paint风格涂鸦，歪斜的线条、变形的脸、潦草的背景一应俱全。
- 风潮源自韩国Threads，用户@withgrdnrush用GPT Image 2创作了名为「世界上最微不足道的问题」的涂鸦，随即席卷全球。
- 提示词出奇简单：「把这张图重绘成一个笨手笨脚的孩子用鼠标在MS Paint上随手乱涂的样子。」
- 成功之处在于AI的「失败」恰到好处——每幅涂鸦仍保留足够辨识度，让人发笑而非困惑。
- 用花了数亿美元训练的模型，来复制小学一年级学生随手乱涂的效果——这本身就是一种诗意。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechRadar and Yahoo Tech coverage. Exact article date unclear; trend uses GPT Image 2 (launched April 2026). Korean Threads origin confirmed across multiple sources. Date estimated May 2026.

blurb_en:
Anthropic and the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation announced a $200 million, four-year partnership on May 14 to deploy Claude in global health, education, and agriculture — specifically the parts of the world that AI development typically skips.
- The deal includes grant funding, Claude usage credits, and technical support for programs in low- and middle-income countries, targeting the 4.6 billion people who lack access to essential health services.
- Claude will power K-12 tutoring tools in the US and foundational literacy and numeracy apps for students in sub-Saharan Africa and India.
- On the health side: accelerating vaccine development and helping governments parse health data faster.
- The partnership also commits to shared public goods — datasets, benchmarks, infrastructure — so breakthroughs in one country can transfer to others.
- It arrived the same week Anthropic reported its first profitable quarter; apparently there is now enough margin to do something other than fight OpenAI.
blurb_zh:
Anthropic与比尔及梅琳达·盖茨基金会于5月14日宣布一项为期四年、总额2亿美元的合作，将Claude部署于全球卫生、教育和农业领域——专为AI开发通常忽视的那些地区。
- 合作内容包括资助金、Claude使用额度和技术支持，覆盖全球46亿缺乏基本医疗服务人口所在的中低收入国家。
- Claude将为美国K-12学生提供辅导工具，同时支持撒哈拉以南非洲和印度的读写与数学基础教育。
- 医疗方面：加速疫苗研发、帮助政府更快分析健康数据。
- 合作还承诺建设共享公共资产——数据集、基准测试和基础设施——让一地突破能惠及其他地区。
- 消息与Anthropic首季盈利报告同周传出；看来利润终于多到可以做些与OpenAI无关的事了。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Anthropic official blog (primary source), Gates Foundation press release, PYMNTS, TechFundingNews, Memeburn, Winbuzzer.

blurb_en:
The US Department of Health and Human Services launched a new AI program called AERO — Audit Enforcement and Risk Oversight — to use ChatGPT and other tools to review five years of state Medicaid and health grant audit reports across all 50 states.
